message.content:
@startuml
participant "C" as C
participant "I" as I
participant "A" as A

participant "LDPepperPizza" as LDPepperPizza
participant "LDCheesePizza" as LDCheesePizza
participant "BJPepperPizza" as BJPepperPizza
participant "BJCheesePizza" as BJCheesePizza

participant "OrderPizza" as OrderPizza
participant "LDFactory" as LDFactory
participant "BJFactory" as BJFactory
participant "AbsFactory" as AbsFactory

participant "Pizza" as Pizza

A <<Actor>>
A : Pizza
A : void prepare()
A : void bake()
A : void cut()
A : void box()

C : OrderPizza
C : LDPepperPizza
C : LDCheesePizza
C : BJPepperPizza
C : BJCheesePizza

I : Pizza createPizza()

A ..> LDPepperPizza
A ..> LDCheesePizza
A ..> BJPepperPizza
A ..> BJCheesePizza

C ..> LDFactory
C ..> BJFactory
C ..> AbsFactory

C ..> LDFactory
C ..> BJFactory
C ..> AbsFactory

C ..> LDPepperPizza
C ..> LDCheesePizza
C ..> BJPepperPizza
C ..> BJCheesePizza

@enduml
